description: Letter from Ibrāhīm al-Ḥakīm, unknown location, to ʿAbd al-Karīm b. Maʿānī(?), in Cairo. The letter is in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic with the address in Arabic script. The letter consists mostly of greetings.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic לקהיר. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
